title: 2026 turned out to be unexpectedly smooth for me not due to luck, but because of meticulous planning.
author: Ok-Basil2753
selftext:
For a while, my investing spiraled completely out of control.

Emotional trading, chasing market highs and lows, and a lack of clear structural analysis plunged my account into deep losses. It was a truly terrible feeling not just because of the financial losses, but because it made me question my own judgment.

Then, someone invited me to join a stock sharing and discussion group.

There were no magic signals there, nor any guaranteed returns. Just structure, discipline, and review.

Our discussions were highly systematic, covering topics such as: breakout thresholds for ascending triangles (validated by volume), double tops and bottoms, pennant patterns, confirmation via ATR volatility compression, and multi stage trend confirmation using 5-, 13-, 34-, and 55-day moving averages spanning short, medium, and long term timeframes.

More importantly, we focused on discussing where the risks lay, rather than just where the profits were to be found.

The group consisted of both novices and seasoned traders. Everyone shared their thought processes including their failed trades.

I slowly began to rebuild my structural thinking, moving away from trading purely on intuition. What truly transformed my results was the shift in my trading methodology and mindset.

This group is completely free of charge. I simply want to share the opportunity that helped me in the past with others who might currently be feeling lost or directionless.

If you feel that your trading lacks direction or structure, or if you are looking for a rational environment in which to discuss the markets, please feel free to reach out to me.

comments.author: Lopsided-Rate-6235
comments.body: I setup 2 guys with private education videos that provide the same structure.  I hope they taking advantage of the knowledge.  Its rare that I share
